score_rationale: Toy rubric supports limited formative scoring; strongest weaknesses are dataset provenance, single-cell/spatial method traceability, figure decoding, and overclaiming from enrichment/spatial association.

must_fix.issue: Dataset provenance and accession details are absent.
Single-cell and spatial analysis details are too vague to audit.
Pathway enrichment and spatial association are overclaimed as mechanism and pan-cancer generalization.
Embedding, spatial map, and pathway dot plot are not decodable.

should_fix.issue: Limitations are present but should explicitly map to each overclaim.

claim_calibration.claim: These results prove that the tumor blocks immune infiltration through a cytokine mechanism across cancer types.
claim_calibration.recommended_calibration: In this toy draft, the UMAP, spatial pattern, and enrichment result would at most suggest a hypothesis about immune organization if provenance and methods were supplied.

data_method_traceability.needed_detail: repository, accession, release/access date, sample/cell/spot counts, data object, and code
database version, background set, gene list/ranking, correction method, redundancy handling, and directionality

figure_legend_provenance.needed_detail: embedding method, spatial coordinate/image context, counts, color scale, pathway dot meaning, and source data

policy_guideline_boundaries.note: Do not generalize toy scoring criteria to real dissertation review.
Single-cell, spatial, pathway, and pan-cancer rules support traceability and claim calibration, not factual adjudication without sources.

uncertainty.reason: No data, code, analysis object, or figures
uncertainty.needed_to_resolve: Dataset accession, code/notebook, analysis object, and source data

draft_stage_caveats: Early-draft status means missing code, figures, and source data are recorded as must-fix development tasks, not final-submission allegations.
next_actions: Add dataset accession and release/access date.
Add single-cell and spatial QC/method details.
Add enrichment parameters and pathway database version.
Provide figure files and source data before figure-level review.
